2. **Registry Files & Structure** ### Main Registry Entry Point **File:** `/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/registry.ts` This file imports from multiple sub-registries and combines them: ```typescript import { ui } from "./ui/_registry" import { examples } from "./examples/_registry" import { blocks } from "./blocks/_registry" import { charts } from "./charts/_registry" import { hooks } from "./hooks/_registry" import { lib } from "./lib/_registry" ``` ### UI Components Registry **File:** `/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/_registry.ts` This is where you register new UI components. {children}
